text.title: domain-driven-design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a domain expert available for modeling sessions?

conclusion.verdict: skip — DDD without an expert produces dev-invented models the business does not recognise
skip — DDD overhead outweighs benefit for trivial domains
scaffold bounded context + aggregates + ubiquitous language
